title: InternRadar AI Internship Entry
description: Schema for a single verification-first internship posting entry. Every entry must be backed by an official application link and a last-verified date. Unknown values must be 'Unclear' or empty, never guessed.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the entry (e.g. slug 'company-role-term').

role.description: Role title as written on the official posting.

location.description: Human-readable location, e.g. 'San Francisco, CA' or 'Remote (US)'.

application_url.description: Official application/apply link. Must be present and non-empty.

source_url.description: URL of the source where the posting was discovered or verified.

source_type.description: Type of source for the posting.

status.description: Application status. 'Open' only if the official page is reachable and still accepting applications.

last_verified_date.description: Date the official page was last confirmed, YYYY-MM-DD. Must be present.

discovered_date.description: Date the posting was first added, YYYY-MM-DD.

age_days.description: Derived days since discovered_date. Must not be guessed.

tech_keywords.description: Technologies explicitly named in the posting.

ai_relevance.description: AI/ML relevance based only on posting text.

full_stack_relevance.description: Full-stack relevance based only on posting text.

student_level.description: Target student level per the posting.

freshman_sophomore_friendly.description: Whether early undergraduates are eligible, per evidence.

requires_us_citizenship.description: Whether U.S. citizenship is required, per evidence.

sponsorship_note.description: Short factual note on sponsorship / CPT / OPT stance, or ambiguity.

work_authorization_note.description: Short factual note on work-authorization requirements stated by the posting.

evidence_notes.description: Short evidence supporting citizenship/sponsorship/authorization/relevance claims. May quote at most ~1 sentence.

fit_summary.description: Short evidence-based summary of why this role may fit an undergraduate CS student.

compensation_min.description: Lower bound of pay explicitly listed on the official page, or null if unclear/not listed.

compensation_max.description: Upper bound of pay explicitly listed on the official page, or null if unclear/not listed.

compensation_period.description: Pay period of the listed compensation.

compensation_note.description: Short human-readable pay summary, e.g. '$25/hr', '$7,000/month', 'Unpaid', or 'Unclear'.

compensation_evidence.description: Short evidence from the official application page, or a note that no pay info was found.
